title: Headsteal
description: Headsteal PvP with a twist. Steal a player's head to banish them from the server.
body:
---- ### Important Stuff for Server Owners Default Recipie (can be changed):
![headsteal.png](https://i.imgur.com/GjxZn1X.png)
Default config ```yml # Gameplay Settings # Determines the consequence of elimination. # true = Players are banned from the server upon death. # false = Players are set to Spectator mode upon death. useBan: false # Visual Effects # Shows the Totem of Undying particle effect to the player being revived. show-totem: true # Shows the Totem of Undying particle effect to the player performing the revival. show-totem-reviver: true # Custom Recipe Configuration # Defines the crafting recipe for the revival item. # The numbers 1-9 represent the slots in a 3x3 crafting grid (1 is top-left, 9 is bottom-right). # IMPORTANT: Use valid Material names (e.g., DIAMOND_BLOCK, NETHERITE_INGOT). # Invalid names will cause errors HeadRecipe: 1: "DIAMOND_BLOCK" 2: "NETHERITE_INGOT" 3: "DIAMOND_BLOCK" 4: "NETHERITE_INGOT" 5: "TOTEM_OF_UNDYING" 6: "NETHERITE_INGOT" 7: "DIAMOND_BLOCK" 8: "NETHERITE_INGOT" 9: "DIAMOND_BLOCK" # Commands to run for Events # These commands are run from the console. # Use {PLAYER_DEAD} for the victim and {PLAYER_KILLER} for the attacker. # Only works if killed by player not command enable-actions-on-death: false actions-on-death: - "eco give {PLAYER_KILLER} 100" - "eco take {PLAYER_DEAD} 100" # Message Configuration # - You can use standard Bukkit color codes (e.g., &a for green, &c for red). # - To disable a specific message, set it to an empty string: "" # Elimination Messages # {PLAYER_DEAD} - The name of the player who died. # {PLAYER_KILLER} - The name of the killer (Only available in kill-message). kill-message: "&c[HeadSteal]: {PLAYER_DEAD} is killed by {PLAYER_KILLER} !!" kill-by-command-message: "&c[HeadSteal]: {PLAYER_DEAD} is killed" # Revival Messages # {PLAYER_DEAD} - The name of the player being revived. # {PLAYER_REVIVER} - The name of the player reviving them (Only available in revive-message). revive-message: "&a[HeadSteal]: {PLAYER_DEAD} is revived by {PLAYER_REVIVER} !!" revive-by-command-message: "&a[HeadSteal]: {PLAYER_DEAD} is revived" # Ban/Kick Messages (Used when useBan is true) # These messages are displayed on the screen of the player being kicked/banned. # {PLAYER_KILLER} - The name of the killer (Only available in kick-message). kick-message: "&c[HeadSteal]: {PLAYER_KILLER} killed you !!" kick-by-command-message: "&c[HeadSteal]: You are killed !!" # Error and Status Messages # {PLAYER} - The target player name referenced in the command. # Sent when a player who has never joined the server. player-never-played: "&c[HeadSteal]: {PLAYER} Has Never Played on this server !!" # Sent when attempting to revive a player who is currently alive. player-not-eliminated: "&c[HeadSteal]: {PLAYER} is not dead yet !!" # Sent when attempting to eliminate a player who is already dead/banned. player-already-eliminated: "&c[HeadSteal]: {PLAYER} already eliminated !!" # Sent to an eliminated player if they attempt to join (Used when useBan is true). player-still-eliminated: "&c[HeadSteal]: You are still eliminated !" # Miscellaneous Messages # Sent when placing a head that lacks valid owner data. name-on-head-notvalid: "&c[HeadSteal]: Name on Head Not Valid !!" # Sent if the head item's data is corrupted. head-broken-cant-be-fixed: "&c[HeadSteal]: This head is broken and cant be fixed !!" # Sent to players with admin permissions who join while eliminated. admin-join-override: "&a[HeadSteal]: You are still eliminated but joined with admin override" # Sent when an eliminated player tries to teleport. not-allowed-to-tp-after-death: "&c[HeadSteal]: Not allowed to Teleport after Death" # Sent when a player lacks the required permission node for a command. no-permission: "&c[HeadSteal]: You don't have permission !!" ```
--- Try out my other plugin: [NightVisionPlusPlus - The most customizible/brandable nightvision plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nv++) --- # Headsteal A thrilling addition to your Minecraft anarchy server ## What is Headsteal? Headsteal is a new game mechanic for Minecraft anarchy servers that adds an extra layer of challenge and excitement to PvP encounters. When a player is killed, their head drops as loot, and if the head is picked up by another player, the killed player is banned from the server until their head is placed back down. ## Why you'll love Headsteal: + **PvP with an extra challenge**: Players have to be careful not to lose their heads ! + **Team up to save your friends**: Work together to bring back your banned buddies. + **Keeps things interesting:** You never know when someone might get banned ! ## Commands: + /hrevive + /heliminate + /hreload ## Features + Can use Spectator instead of Banning + customizable messages _**Get Headsteal today and make your anarchy server the best !**_
